Campaigns

Save the Front Counter at Chingford Police Station

In July, the Labour Government announced plans to close the front desk at Chingford Police Station. This decision was as a result of a Police Funding Settlement...

Save West Essex Cricket and Football Club

Help Save out West Essex Cricket and Football Club! For 100 years, this club has been a vital community asset, but now it’s future it at risk. Soaring...

JOIN THE CAMPAIGN TO SAVE SOUTH CHINGFORD COMMUNITY LIBRARY

The South Chingford Community Library (SCCL) is at risk of closing permanently. I need your help to save it! In 2011, Waltham Forest Council closed the Council...

HELP ME BRING BACK THE 505 BUS TO WALTHAM ABBEY

We can bring back the 505-bus route to Waltham Abbey. But I need your help to do it. The 505 bus, running between Chingford and Harlow, is no longer in service...

Save Our Suburbs in Chingford & Woodford Green

Say no to over-development in Chingford & Woodford Green. I'm actively campaigning against out-of-scale and out-of-character high-rise blocks in our area...

Whipps Cross Hospital Redevelopment

Iain Duncan Smith MP for Chingford and Woodford Green
